login.unavailableBody: The client portal is not enabled in this environment.
login.title: Client Portal
login.subtitle: View your case progress

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

cases.title: Your Cases
cases.welcome: Welcome, {{name}}. Track progress on your credit repair cases.
cases.empty: No cases are linked to your portal account yet.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Follow these steps so we can review your credit reports and start your dispute strategy.
gettingStarted.step1: Review and e-sign the compliance documents below (CROA disclosure, service agreement, and FCRA authorization).
gettingStarted.step2After: to request your free reports from Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion. You are entitled to one free report from each bureau every 12 months.
gettingStarted.step3Before: Download each bureau report as a PDF, then upload all three under
gettingStarted.step4: We will notify you when analysis and dispute preparation begin.
gettingStarted.tipBefore: Tip: use the official site only (
gettingStarted.tipAfter: ). Avoid look-alike sites that charge unnecessary fees.

consents.title: Required agreements
consents.subtitle: Review and sign each document below before dispute mail can be prepared for your case.
consents.allSigned: All required agreements are on file. Your case team can proceed with dispute mail.
consents.fullNamePlaceholder: Type your name as it appears on your ID
consents.checkboxLabel: I have reviewed the document above and agree to sign electronically. A signed PDF will be generated and stored with my case.
consents.success: Document signed successfully. A PDF copy has been saved to your case file.

attestation.croa_disclosure: I have read the CROA disclosure statement above and acknowledge my right to cancel within three business days.
attestation.croa_service_agreement: I have read and agree to the credit repair services agreement, including fees, services, and cancellation terms.
attestation.fcra_authorization: I authorize the organization to obtain and dispute information in my consumer credit reports on my behalf.

documents.title: Your documents
documents.subtitle: Upload evidence and supporting files for this case.
documents.fileHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, TIFF, or TXT up to 25 MB.
documents.empty: No documents uploaded yet. Use Upload document to share files with your case team.

messages.title: Secure messages
messages.subtitle: Send updates and questions to your case team in a private thread.
messages.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation with your case team below.
messages.threadClosed: This message thread is closed. Contact your case team if you need further assistance.

push.loadError: Unable to load push notification settings.
push.title: Message notifications
push.subtitle: Register this browser for push alerts when your case team sends a secure message.
push.notConfigured: Push delivery is not fully configured.
push.success: Push subscription registered for this device.
